description: Programmable Peripheral Interface - generic GPIO expander, vintage I/O cards

title: Intel 8259A PIC
description: Programmable Interrupt Controller (1976), x86 IRQ handling for ~30 years

description: RS-232 transceiver with charge-pump (1987), still in countless serial designs

title: Motorola MC1488
description: Quad RS-232 line driver (1971), classic ±12V serial transceiver

title: NE555 Timer
description: Iconic analog timer IC (1972) - over 1 billion sold per year - still in production

description: Classic CMOS quad NAND (CD4000 family, 1968) - vintage CMOS logic

title: Broadcom BCM21553

description: USB ↔ UART bridge, frequent counterfeits and Windows driver headaches
